column3: what's up guys intentional back with yet
another biz list video now i know it's
been a while since i've done a video
like this but it's never too late to hop
back in
and honestly you're gonna have to thank
this comment for getting me back into
these
i didn't really plan on making any
business videos but since people are
asking for it i figured why not
and yeah we're going to go through the
list of gear and i'm going to provide
some alternatives just in case you
cannot get some of the items or you
guild this gear a bit differently
with all that being said let's just hop
into
it starting out the helm we have the
tier 5 helm piece now this helmet is
just freaking solid as well as the four
set bonus from this set being freaking
ridiculous for us
some good alternatives if you can't get
this home or planning on just getting
into four set bones from other pieces
would be the engineering goggles or even
the tier 4 helm
there are some other pieces from the
tier 5 raids that are solid however the
minisock is just way too big to pass up
on so try and aim for a helm with a meta
socket
moving on to our neck piece we got the
sun king's talisman coming from kel
thaws and it's a quest dropping from him
so you will 100 eventually get the snake
piece it's pretty freaking ridiculous
with how beefy it is the damage from
spelker is just juicy
however if you cannot get the snack
piece of small terms it would be the
adornment of stolen souls from prince
and kara or even brooch of heighten
potential from shadow laps
moving on to the shoulder slot it's
going to be the tier 5 shoulders which i
personally love for the extra hit that
comes from them although i do admit i'm
not the biggest fan of how they look
even if it is very druid like some
alternatives would be the tier 4 druid
shoulders mantle of the elven kings
which drops from the trash and ssc tk or
illidari shoulder pads dropping from
morigrim tidewalker and ssc
moving on to the cloak it's a bit
debatable but most agree on the ancient
spell cloak from kazakh being bis
but there are other cloaks you can
choose from for example the brute cloak
from hiking mogar and gruel zlaire if
you want some more hit then the ruby
drape from prince and cara would be a
good choice or if you want to go fall on
spell power then the royal cloak from
kel thoth would be decent
moving on to the chess piece the tier 5
chest is just going to be our item the
chestpiece is a very solid item however
there are some other ones that you can
get
for example the vestments of the sea
witch coming from lady vagina and ssc
or the rope of hateful echoes dropping
from hydros and ssc as well
and then of course spellfire robes from
tailoring
moving on to bracers the best is going
to be the mindstorm wristbands from
alarm tk sadly there are many bracelets
for us to choose from so it's either
these ones or bracers of havoc from
tathering or potentially the winhawk
ones from leatherworking
moving onto gloves it's going to be the
tier 5 gloves although not having any
gem slots on them they still are pretty
solid and will help with getting our 4
set bonus
some alternatives would be the gauntlets
of the sun king from kel thousand tk or
the spellfire gloves from tailoring
moving on to the belt the best is going
to be belt of blasting a rare recipe
dropped from trash and ssc tk
this bell is freaking fantastic and
you're going to want to kiss ass in your
guild so you get the recipe or have them
craft it for you asap
some guillermo drums would be the chord
of screaming terrors if you want more
hit this comes from the lurker below in
ssc malefic girl from terrace and eohof
and cara the spellfire belt from
tailoring or even the winhawk belt from
leatherworking
moving on to the pants technically
you'll want to go for the leggings of
the 7th circle however these do come
from doomlord kazakh
some gala turns would be the small
strike pants from tailoring or even tier
five and maybe even the tier four pants
would be good as well
moving on to the boots we have the boots
of blasting once again a rare recipe
dropped from trash and ssc
tk
some good alternatives would be the
velvet boots from the lurker below in
ssc or the boots of foretelling from
maiden and kara
moving on to rings the best would be the
ring of reoccurrence coming from the
chest event and kara and you want to get
the band of eternity which is from the
scales of the saiyan's reputation which
you can obtain friendly reputation with
once completing the hydro attunement
process
some ghetto terms would be the violet
eye ring which could be obtained from
reputation in karazhan for some more hit
the ban of crimson fairy from mac
theradon would be a good choice the ring
of endless crows from the lady of ajita
is also a good ring
moving on to the trinkets it's a bit
tougher to say what's biz because
trinkets can be swapped in and out for
certain encounters along with just being
reliant on your raid comp and even your
raid itself so instead i'm just going to
plaster while trinkets that you were
wanting to aim for so you could switch
them in and out when needed i will say
that i personally use the icon of the
silver crescent and the spell power
trick from brewfest as my main ones but
once again i mixed my trinkets quite a
bit
moving on to the idol idol of the raven
goddess is going to be solid to help not
only our crit but our entire group's
grit so just overall a pretty big dps
increase for everyone
if you do not have that yet then the
ivory idol is going to be your go too
for our weapon we are wanting the nexus
key from kel thos in tk
i mean just look at the stats on this
thing it's actually freaking insane with
how stacked the staff is
if you can't get this then a good
alternative would be nethers in mind
blame for prince and karazhan paired up
with any of these offhands
now i know i did put a lot of
alternatives in and some of these items
you may have been questioning and
frankly that's why i love tbc
you can really tune your character for
what you want out of it and build it to
work with your current raid setup for
example i personally like crit so i'm
building pretty grit heavy and most
spell powered gyms i'm simply switching
out for the chris sp gems anyway i hope
this helps someone out there and if you
liked the video make sure hit that like
button and if you want to see more from
me then hit that sub button make sure
you have a great day and peace
